parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "user_id": "{{ $json.user_id }}",
  "business_name": {{ JSON.stringify($json.business_name) }},
  "niche": {{ JSON.stringify($json.niche) }},
  "target_customer": {{ JSON.stringify($json.target_customer) }},
  "primary_goal": {{ JSON.stringify($json.primary_goal) }},
  "monthly_revenue_range": {{ JSON.stringify($json.monthly_revenue_range) }},
  "biggest_challenge": {{ JSON.stringify($json.biggest_challenge) }},
  "website_url": {{ $json.website_url ? JSON.stringify($json.website_url) : 'null' }},
  "completed_at": "{{ $json.now }}",
  "updated_at": "{{ $json.now }}"
}

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "next_step": "dashboard_creation",
  "user_id": "{{ $('Confirm AI Builder Triggered').first().json.user_id }}",
  "onboarding_completed": true,
  "ai_profile_build_queued": {{ $('Confirm AI Builder Triggered').first().json.ai_builder_triggered }},
  "completed_at": "{{ $('Confirm AI Builder Triggered').first().json.now }}"
}
